title: orthocarpus cuspidatus subsp. cryptanthus
intro: Orthocarpus cuspidatus subsp. cryptanthus, also known as the cryptanthus orthocarpus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orthocarpus cuspidatus subsp. cryptanthus include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be used to benefit from its medicinal properties.
